_comments.exclude: Repos never imported. 'skills' is always excluded — it IS this registry. Add repo names here to opt a repo out of bulk import.
_comments.include_only: If set, only these repos are scanned during bulk import (overrides exclude). Useful for CI testing.
_comments.source_dirs: Overrides the default set of directories the importer checks for skill subdirectories. Default: ['skills', '.agent/skills', '.agents/skills', '.claude/skills'].
